name: US W-2 / Pay Stub
description: US tax forms and pay stubs (W-2, W-4, 1099, generic paystubs). Detects SSN, EIN, US dates, US ZIP codes, US phone numbers, bank routing numbers (context-anchored), plus names, addresses, account numbers and amounts.

patterns.name: EIN (Employer ID)
patterns.description: US Employer Identification Number — XX-XXXXXXX format

patterns.name: US ZIP Code
patterns.description: US ZIP — 5 digits or ZIP+4 format

patterns.name: US phone number
patterns.description: US phone — (XXX) XXX-XXXX or XXX-XXX-XXXX, optional +1, bounded to avoid matching inside longer numbers

patterns.name: Bank routing number
patterns.description: US bank routing number — anchored to 'Routing'/'ABA'/'RTN' label to avoid false positives on any 9-digit run

patterns.name: Bank account number
patterns.description: US bank account number (6-17 digits) — anchored to 'Account' label

patterns.name: Driver License (generic US)
patterns.description: US driver license number (varies by state, generic pattern, case-sensitive)
